subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto the Desired One, Who hath, through His most exalted Word, distinguished between the loved ones and the enemies [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد حضرت مقصودی را لایق و سزاست که مابین احباب و اعدا بکلمه علیا تفصیل فرمود
subcodes.subjects: @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @consolation and comfort, @personal instructions, @greed; envy; covetousness; attachment to the world, @prayer for protection
